name: Hamburg-Style Fish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Fillets may be fresh or frozen. They can include cod, turbot, or other firm white fish.
2. Melt butter in a frying pan. Place the fish fillets in the pan and pour over hot water. Bring to a boil, cover, lower heat and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, slice the hard cooked eggs and dill pickles. Drain the fish, cool it, then cut into cubes.
4. Prepare the salad sauce by blending mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl.
5. In an individual serving dishes, gently mix together the fish cubes, sliced egg, pickle pieces, and capers.
6. Spoon the salad sauce over the top of each dish.
7. Chill for 30 minutes before garnishing.
8. To garnish, cut the remaining hard cooked egg into eight pieces and chop the beet slices. Arrange the garnish on each serving.
9. Serve immediately.
